name: Dilly Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large bowl, making a well in the center of the mixture.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the egg and next four ingredients, stirring well. Add to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
3. Place paper baking cups in muffin pans and coat with cooking spray. Add batter, filling two-thirds full.
4. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 28 minutes. Remove from pans immediately and cool on wire racks.
